lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa sohaagan jaaneeai gurasabad beechaare |3|
lines.english: Then she is known as the happy soul-bride, if she contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤ ਕੀ ਬਾਂਧੀ ਸਭ ਫਿਰੈ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kirat kee baandhee sabh firai dekhahu beechaaree |
lines.english: Bound by the actions she has committed, she wanders around - see this and understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਆ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਵਿਚਾਰੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: es no kiaa aakheeai kiaa kare vichaaree |4|
lines.english: What can we say to her? What can the poor soul-bride do? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਈ ਨਿਰਾਸੀ ਉਠਿ ਚਲੀ ਚਿਤ ਬੰਧਿ ਨ ਧੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhee niraasee utth chalee chit bandh na dheeraa |
lines.english: Disappointed and hopeless, she gets up and departs. There is no support or encouragement in her consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਕਹਹਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਭਲ ਮੀਠਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jogee kaheh jog bhal meetthaa avar na doojaa bhaaee |
lines.english: The Yogi says that Yoga is good and sweet, and nothing else is, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ₂ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree₂ |
lines.english: Gauree :

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹੁ ਭਜੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਕਬੀਰਾ ॥੫॥੬॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: har kee charanee laag rahu bhaj saran kabeeraa |5|6|50|
lines.english: So remain attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet, and hurry to His Sanctuary, Kabeer! ||5||6||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁੰਡਿਤ ਮੁੰਡਿਤ ਏਕੈ ਸਬਦੀ ਏਇ ਕਹਹਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: runddit munddit ekai sabadee ee kaheh sidh paaee |1|
lines.english: Those who shave their heads, and those who amputate their limbs, and those who utter only a single word, all say that they have attained the spiritual perfection of the Siddhas. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਨੇ ਅੰਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: har bin bharam bhulaane andhaa |
lines.english: Without the Lord, the blind ones are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੀ ਤਹੀ ਸਮਾਨੀ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਬਿਸਰੀ ਤਬ ਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeh te upajee tahee samaanee ih bidh bisaree tab hee |
lines.english: The soul is re-absorbed into that from which it originated, when one leaves this path of errors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਉ ਆਪੁ ਛੁਟਕਾਵਨਿ ਤੇ ਬਾਧੇ ਬਹੁ ਫੰਧਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa peh jaau aap chhuttakaavan te baadhe bahu fandhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: And those, to whom I go to find release - they themselves are bound by all sorts of chains. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਗੁਣੀ ਸੂਰ ਹਮ ਦਾਤੇ ਏਹਿ ਕਹਹਿ ਬਡ ਹਮ ਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: panddit gunee soor ham daate ehi kaheh badd ham hee |2|
lines.english: The scholarly Pandits, the virtuous, the brave and the generous, all assert that they alone are great. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਚੂਕੈ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur milai andheraa chookai in bidh maanak laheeai |3|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, the darkness is dispelled, and in this way, the jewel is obtained. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਕਿਉ ਰਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh bujhaae soee boojhai bin boojhe kiau raheeai |
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord inspires to understand. Without understanding, what can anyone do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਗੂੰਗੈ ਗੁੜੁ ਖਾਇਆ ਪੂਛੇ ਤੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ॥੪॥੭॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer goongai gurr khaaeaa poochhe te kiaa kaheeai |4|7|51|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, the mute has tasted the molasses, but what can he say about it if he is asked? ||4||7||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਬਾਵੇ ਦਾਹਨੇ ਬਿਕਾਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਕਰਿ ਰਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: taj baave daahane bikaaraa har pad drirr kar raheeai |
lines.english: Give up the evil actions of your left and right hands, and grasp hold of the Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ₁ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree poorabee₁ kabeer jee |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Poorbee, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਕਛੁ ਅਹਾ ਤਹਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਤਹ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeh kachh ahaa tahaa kichh naahee panch tat teh naahee |
lines.english: Where something existed, now there is nothing. The five elements are no longer there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੜਾ ਪਿੰਗੁਲਾ ਸੁਖਮਨ ਬੰਦੇ ਏ ਅਵਗਨ ਕਤ ਜਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eirraa pingulaa sukhaman bande e avagan kat jaahee |1|
lines.english: The Ida, the Pingala and the Sushmanaa - O human being, how can the breaths through these be counted now? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਸੰਸਾ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਕੋ ਨ ਕਹੈ ਸਮਝਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eeh sansaa mo kau anadin biaapai mo kau ko na kahai samajhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This cynicism afflicts me, night and day; who can explain this to me and help me understand? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਗਾ ਤੂਟਾ ਗਗਨੁ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਇਆ ਤੇਰਾ ਬੋਲਤੁ ਕਹਾ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taagaa toottaa gagan binas geaa teraa bolat kahaa samaaee |
lines.english: The string has been broken, and the Sky of the Tenth Gate has been destroyed. Where has your speech gone?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋੜਨਹਾਰੋ ਸਦਾ ਅਤੀਤਾ ਇਹ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਸੁ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jorranahaaro sadaa ateetaa ih kaheeai kis maahee |2|
lines.english: The Joiner is forever unattached; now, within whom is the soul said to be contained? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਬਰਭੰਡੁ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਤਹ ਨਾਹੀ ਰਚਨਹਾਰੁ ਤਹ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeh barabhandd pindd teh naahee rachanahaar teh naahee |
lines.english: Where the world is - the body is not there; the mind is not there either.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋੜੀ ਜੁੜੈ ਨ ਤੋੜੀ ਤੂਟੈ ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jorree jurrai na torree toottai jab lag hoe binaasee |
lines.english: By joining the elements, people cannot join them, and by breaking, they cannot be broken, until the body perishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾ ਕੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕਾ ਕੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਕੋ ਕਾਹੂ ਕੈ ਜਾਸੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaa ko tthaakur kaa ko sevak ko kaahoo kai jaasee |3|
lines.english: Of whom is the soul the master, and of whom is it the servant? Where, and to whom does it go? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਕਾ ਮਰਮੁ ਓਹੀ ਪਰੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਓਹੁ ਤਉ ਸਦਾ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੪॥੧॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: auaa kaa maram ohee par jaanai ohu tau sadaa abinaasee |4|1|52|
lines.english: Only He Himself truly knows the secrets of His mystery; He is eternal and indestructible. ||4||1||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗਿ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ ਜਹਾ ਬਸੇ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer liv laag rahee hai jahaa base din raatee |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, I have lovingly focused my attention on that place where the Lord dwells, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਕੰਨੀ ਮੁੰਦਾ ਪਰਮਿਤਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਖਿੰਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: surat simrit due kanee mundaa paramit baahar khinthaa |
lines.english: Let contemplation and intuitive meditation be your two ear-rings, and true wisdom your patched overcoat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਜਨ ਮੈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: mere raajan mai bairaagee jogee |
lines.english: O my King, I am a Yogi, a hermit, a renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨ ਗੁਫਾ ਮਹਿ ਆਸਣੁ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਕਲਪ ਬਿਬਰਜਿਤ ਪੰਥਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sun gufaa meh aasan baisan kalap bibarajit panthaa |1|
lines.english: In the cave of silence, dwell in your Yogic posture; let the subjugation of desire be your spiritual path. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਤ ਨ ਸੋਗ ਬਿਓਗੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: marat na sog biogee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I do not die or suffer pain or separation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਮਹਿ ਸਿੰਙੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਬਟੂਆ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਭਸਮਾਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: khandd brahamandd meh singee meraa battooaa sabh jag bhasamaadhaaree |
lines.english: The solar systems and galaxies are my horn; the whole world is the bag to carry my ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਗੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਲੁ ਪਲਟੀਐ ਛੂਟੈ ਹੋਇ ਪਸਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taarree laagee tripal palatteeai chhoottai hoe pasaaree |2|
lines.english: Eliminating the three qualities and finding release from this world is my deep meditation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਪਵਨੁ ਦੁਇ ਤੂੰਬਾ ਕਰੀ ਹੈ ਜੁਗ ਜੁਗ ਸਾਰਦ ਸਾਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: man pavan due toonbaa karee hai jug jug saarad saajee |
lines.english: My mind and breath are the two gourds of my fiddle, and the Lord of all the ages is its frame.
